creator: bzeeb+freebsdports@zabbadoz.net
text:
On Sun, 11 May 2008, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of emulators/hercules,
>
> Please note that PR ports/123600 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123600


A patch for this is already in
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119449

So this can be closed.

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb              Stop bit received. Insert coin for new game.
